overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban transit hub at night. The environment features neon teal and red lighting, covered walkways, open plazas, and dense crowds of pedestrians with distinctive futuristic fashion.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: approaching exit of covered walkway into open plaza area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway following a pedestrian in a blue jacket and cap

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and cap walking ahead of ego toward plaza exit

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the left wall
concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent lighting running parallel to walkway
transparent safety barrier along the right edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway with teal-colored flooring. A large digital billboard illuminates the left wall while the ceiling features long fluorescent light strips. The walkway leads toward an open plaza visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with distinctive red textured ground and decorative wall symbols

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with red textured ground surface
passing large red X symbols mounted on teal wall panels

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza navigating around scattered pedestrians and groups

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red cap standing near the curb edge
group of pedestrians walking across the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: distinctive red textured pavement covering the open plaza floor
teal building wall featuring large illuminated red X-shaped symbols

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious plaza with distinctive red textured ground. The area features teal walls decorated with large red X symbols. Pedestrians are scattered across the space, and the ceiling remains covered but with a more open, high-vaulted structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along teal building facade with heavy pedestrian traffic

events.description: enters covered walkway section with teal paneled walls and dense crowds
navigating through dense crowd, passing pedestrians with large orange backpacks

agents.ego_description: walking through crowded covered walkway, maneuvering between pedestrians and following those with orange backpacks

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians with large orange backpacks walking ahead in the same direction
pedestrian in bright blue jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large building facade covered in teal-colored panels with geometric patterns
large palm trees in concrete planters lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a crowded covered walkway with teal paneled walls on the right and potted palm trees on the left. The density of pedestrians increases significantly, requiring navigation through groups of people including individuals wearing distinctive orange backpacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway with seating areas and directional markings approaching building entrance

events.description: passing concrete seating benches with pedestrians sitting and resting
slight turn toward building entrance with illuminated glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking past seating areas with resting pedestrians, approaching glass entrance doors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt sitting on concrete bench using a device

entered.detail: modern concrete seating benches with people resting
large yellow triangular directional markings painted on the ground
illuminated glass doorway entrance to the building

segments.scene_description: The final section features concrete benches on the left where pedestrians are seated, with potted palm trees providing greenery. Yellow directional arrows mark the ground leading toward a glass entrance door on the right side of the teal building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic transit hub that transitions from a sterile, illuminated corridor into a bustling, crowded pedestrian concourse. It begins within a covered walkway characterized by teal flooring and a large digital billboard, moving steadily toward a distant opening. As the character emerges, the environment shifts into a spacious plaza with red textured ground and teal walls marked by large red X symbols under a high-vaulted ceiling. The scene then narrows into a densely populated walkway where the camera navigates through crowds and past potted palm trees, while the lighting remains a mix of teal and neon. Finally, the path opens slightly to reveal concrete benches and yellow directional arrows on the floor, leading the movement toward a glass entrance door set into a teal building.
